REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR APR-21-2008 BEFORE HEARING; PER WRITTEN LETTER REQUEST BY DEFT COUNSEL, HEIDI QUAN, DUE TO NOTICE OF MOTION TO PRIVATE MEDIATION IN LIEU JUDICIAL ARBITRATION FILED.

DEFENDANTS RONDA BAALKE AND DAIOHS U.S.A., INC.'S MOTION TO ELECT MEDIATION IN LIEU OF ARBITRATION IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO OBJECTION, THE TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT THE MOTION IS ADOPTED. THE MOTION IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. THE COURT ORDERED THE CASE SCHEDULED FOR A JURY TRIAL ON 11/03/2008 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 206. THE COURT TO GIVE NOTICE OF TRIAL DATE AND MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. THE COURT FURTHER ORDERED A MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SCHEDULED ON 7/23/2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPARTMENT 212. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LETICIA PEREZ, CSR#7782 (212)

Ntc Of Mtn To Elect Mediation In Lieu Of Arbitration
Off Calendar May-01-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Defendants Ronda Baalke and Daiohs U.S.A., Inc.'s Motion to Elect Mediation in Lieu of Arbitration is scheduled this day. Heidi C. Quan, Esq., appearing for the defendants and moving party. There being no other appearance nor an objection, the tentative ruling to grant the motion is adopted. The motion is granted. Order signed in open court. The court ordered the case scheduled for a Jury Trial on 11/03/2008 at 9:30 AM in Department 206. The court to give notice of Trial Date and Mandatory Settlement Conference. The court further ordered a Mediation Order to Show Cause scheduled on 7/23/2008 at 10:00 am in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez, CSR#7782 (212)
